hypothesis: If last-layer embeddings from ~50 diverse scientific foundation models trained on molecules, materials, and proteins exhibit high cross-model alignment (CKNNA) and similar intrinsic dimensionality for in-distribution datasets (e.g., OMat24 and sAlex) but show reduced alignment and divergent intrinsic dimensionality for out-of-distribution datasets (OMol25), then universal, architecture-agnostic representations of matter exist.
